title: Attack on Endor Scenario Pack

The '''''Attack on Endor'' Scenario Pack''' is a scenario expansion set, released on [[February 24]], [[2006]]<ref name="Wizards">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/AttackOnEndor|text=Attack on Endor Scenario Pack}}</ref> for the [[Star Wars Miniatures]] Game, produced by [[Wizards of the Coast]]. The scenarios were written by [[Sterling Hershey]].

==Contents==
Contents include:
*4 Miniatures
**[[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]]
**Stormtrooper Officer
**[[Scout trooper/Legends|Scout Trooper]]
**[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]]
*2 Double-sided maps representing:
**[[Endor/Legends|Endor]]
**[[Rancor/Legends|Rancor]] Cave
**[[Jedi Praxeum]]
**Ruined Base
*Scenario Booklet

The AT-ST comes with a new sculpt and paint job (Endor camo) while the others are just reissues from [[Rebel Storm (Star Wars Miniatures)|Rebel Storm]]. All the miniatures' bases are unique to the set and have their own set icon (a Scout Trooper helmet) and number. These changes are also reflected in the corresponding cards.

The scenario booklet contains 6 scenarios continuing the spirit of the discontinued [[Star Wars Miniatures#Ultimate Missions|Ultimate Missions]] set. For easier gameplay, only about a third of [[Universe (Star Wars Miniatures)|Star Wars Miniatures: Universe]] (and about a half dozen common and uncommons from other sets) is required to play all the scenarios, as opposed to the nearly complete sets required for the Ultimate Missions series. The scenarios inside represent battles across the ''Star Wars'' timeline from a Republic siege to the battle of Endor to a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] hunting [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] refugees. New glossary definitions have been added for scenario play such as Concealment and Wreckage.

With the release of this set, all maps that were included were made tournament legal as well as beginning the enforcement of the new "living" rule.

In the ''Star Wars'' logo printed on the cards, the orange and gold lettering has been changed to silver and white. This change seems permanent, as cards for the subsequent [[Champions of the Force (Star Wars Miniatures)|''Champions of the Force'']] set also had this change.

The scenarios in the booklet are:
*Attack on Endor (Rebellion)
*Fighting The Outer Rim Sieges (Clone Wars)
*Magar's World (Rebellion)
*Smuggler's Rescue (Rebellion)
*Temple Intruders (New Republic)
*Overwhelmed (New Jedi Order)
